name: Catalyst Construction & Kitchen Remodeling
review_snippets: Catalyst Construction demonstrated excellent project management skills. Timelines were adhered to, and any unforeseen challenges were addressed promptly and efficiently.
homepage_text_excerpt: Catalyst Construction & Kitchen Remodeling is a licensed and bonded general contractor based in Portland, Oregon, with more than 20-30 years of combined industry experience. Led by owner Ryan Klobas, the team manages whole-home remodeling, targeted updates, and interior refreshes across kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms, and bedrooms for clients throughout the Portland Metro area. As a locally owned general contractor rooted in Portland, the company says it understands the unique character of Pacific Northwest homes. Catalyst is a 5-Star and A+ BBB Rated company, BBB Accredited since February 2013, and has been voted one of the best Portland remodeling companies three years in a row by Angie's List. The company works with each client to determine appropriate warranty coverage, typically including a 1-year workmanship warranty plus standard 1-5 year manufacturer warranties on materials and equipment. After project completion, clients receive a detailed project binder containing product information and warranties, and the team remains available for post-project questions and adjustments. Prospective clients are invited to call or email to get a bid on their kitchen, bath, or whole-home remodel.

name: New Creations Custom Kitchen and Bath
review_snippets: I wish I could have given 10 stars to New Creations! I can't say enough wonderful things about this company. Roy and the entire team were nothing short of phenomenal.
New Creations Should Get 10 Stars!!!!!! Roy and his team recently built and installed custom cabinets in my home. I had an idea of what I wanted, and Roy made my dream a reality!
homepage_text_excerpt: New Creations Custom Kitchen and Bath was started in 2006 with the goal of creating a great client experience for homeowners renovating in the greater Austin, Texas area. Since then, the veteran staff has completed 250+ projects, virtually in every neighborhood in the greater Austin area, and the company has earned 158+ five-star client reviews. The team is described as made up of some of the nicest people and finest artisans in Austin, with most having been with the company since the beginning; the core team includes Erika Echevarria (Lead Designer), Roy, Erin, and Apollo. New Creations positions itself as a one-stop-shop, guiding clients from initial design through final construction on complete kitchen and master bath remodels, up to whole-home renovations. The company has won service awards from Houzz, Citysearch, Angie's List, and Google, including a Thermador Regional Kitchen of the Year award. The business is located at 11716 Big Trail, Austin, TX 78759, and operates Monday-Friday, 8:00am-5:00pm.

name: Carolina Home Remodeling
review_snippets: I highly recommend Carolina Home for your bathroom remodel project.
I would recommend this company to ANYONE with no hesitation!
homepage_text_excerpt: Carolina Home Remodeling has proudly served the Greater Charlotte Area since 2002, offering value-driven solutions for homeowners' most important home improvement needs. The family-owned company was formed by Bob and Elizabeth Anderson and specializes in windows, baths and showers (including tub-to-shower and shower-to-tub conversions and safety showers), entry doors, and patio doors. The company has maintained an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau and states it has earned 1,000+ five-star reviews from satisfied customers. Financing is available for qualified homeowners, including a no-payment, no-interest promotional period offer at an APR of 17.99%; customers who repay in full before the promotional period ends avoid finance charges, and may prepay at any time without penalty. Products come with a lifetime warranty plus a one-year labor warranty, in addition to manufacturer warranties. The company serves Charlotte and numerous surrounding NC and SC communities including Midland, Lenoir, Shelby, Fort Mill, Granite Falls, and Belmont, and maintains a dedicated FAQ page for homeowner questions.

name: Mark Hammer Construction LTD
review_snippets: Mark's timely and informative communication is top notch! His pricing is fair and honest.
would have no problem recommending Mark Hammer Construction to anyone who needs a remodel.
homepage_text_excerpt: Mark Hammer Construction LTD is a family-owned construction firm with more than 20 years of experience specializing in residential remodels, additions, and commercial tenant improvements in the Denver metro area. The company states it delivers seamless service and quality craftsmanship from start to finish, covering home remodeling, kitchen and bathroom renovations, and home additions. The team describes itself as having the depth of experience to bring clients' desires from imagination to reality. Mark Hammer Construction lists its service area as covering Arvada, Brighton, Broomfield, Commerce City, Dacono, Denver, Erie, Fort Lupton, Henderson, Lafayette, Thornton, Todd Creek, Welby, Westminster, and Boulder. Customer testimonials on the company's own testimonials page and third-party platforms emphasize timely and informative communication, fair and honest pricing, and overall professionalism throughout the remodeling process.

name: Crystal Kitchen + Bath
review_snippets: I highly recommend Crystal Kitchen and Bath not only for the high quality work, but for how well they listen and work to meet individual needs.
We highly recommend Crystal Kitchen and Bath.
Crystal kitchen and bath did a great job on my kitchen - great design and project management, stayed within budget and timeline!
Our experience with Crystal Kitchen and Bath was fantastic.
homepage_text_excerpt: Crystal Kitchen + Bath is a full-service design and remodeling firm offering luxury, contemporary kitchen and bathroom design and remodeling, along with custom cabinetry for the whole home. The award-winning team says it has helped homeowners across Minneapolis and the Twin Cities for over 50 years, also designing and remodeling laundry rooms, mudrooms, home offices, and lower levels. The company operates an 8,800 sq. ft. kitchen and bath showroom, and states that roughly 80% of its business comes from past customers and referrals. Visitors can explore recent projects through the company's portfolio page, and those interested in a consultation can complete a contact form so a member of the design team can reach out to discuss the project. The company is headquartered at 3620 Winnetka Ave N, Minneapolis (Crystal), MN 55427.
